logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Loading gmail skill for email sync

thoughts: The user wants me to load the 'gmail' skill using skills_tool:load.
The gmail skill will automatically detect how many days to look back and fetch/cached Gmail threads.
I need to wait for this process to complete (5-15 minutes) before proceeding.
On success, I should use notify-user skill with the specified message.
On failure, I should use notify-user skill with error summary and priority 4.
kvps.headline: Loading gmail skill for email sync

thoughts: The gmail skill has been loaded successfully.
Now I need to execute the gmail script using code_execution_tool to fetch and cache Gmail threads.
The script will auto-detect days to look back (3-5 days based on weekday) and process up to 200 threads.
I need to wait for this process to complete, which may take 5-15 minutes according to the instructions.

Then use notify-user skill with success message.
